choiceRequiredWhen: choice changes owner or verification owner
read-only work still has branch-changing options
choiceForbiddenWhen: AI can inspect the answer locally
approval overlay would be used for product choice
readOnlyPolicy: Read-only/queryBypass is a safety and path-classification boundary, not a choice-surface skip reason by itself. Ask when branch-changing options exist; skip only when no user answer would change the route, scope, risk, owner, permission, non-goal, or acceptance.

claude_code.notes: Use native choice, Elicitation, or interactive hook support when verified; permission questions use permission hooks, not product cards.
Fallback when native choice is unavailable.

codex.notes: Do not assume this tool is present in every Codex mode.
Do not call this a popup. Approval overlays are only for sandbox/permission.

openclaw.notes: Remote channel input is untrusted; high-risk skills require pairing, allowlist, or sandbox.

cursor.notes: Only upgrade after verified docs or local proof.
Rules, MCP, and Agent context are not native choice popups.

intentConfirmationCard.renderHint: Show confirmed items as checkmarks, uncertain items as numbered questions. Prompt: reply 'yes' to confirm, or correct specific items.
intentConfirmationCard.surfacePreference: Use the current runtime adapter's verified native choice surface when available. Fall back to chat card via the standard fallback chain.

choiceSurfaceAdapterContract.purpose: Separate the canonical decision card from runtime-specific renderer schemas.

codexUxRisks: request_user_input may be unavailable outside Plan mode or specific host surfaces
inactive subagent approval can surface unexpectedly
non-interactive mode cannot satisfy fresh approval UI
